stemHtml: What information can be obtained if the selector on the ADIRU is set to "ATT"?

options.a: Complete information from the ADC, but only attitude and heading information from the IRU.
options.b: Complete information from the ADC, and complete information from the IRU.
options.c: No information from the ADC, and complete information from the IRU.
options.d: No information from the ADC, and no information from the IRU.
